mapper.select: SELECT di.* FROM patra_registry.sys_dict_item di JOIN patra_registry.sys_dict_item_alias dia ON dia.item_id = di.id JOIN patra_registry.sys_dict_type dt ON dt.id = di.type_id WHERE dia.source_system = #{sourceSystem} AND dia.external_code = #{externalCode} AND di.enabled = 1 AND di.deleted = 0 AND dt.deleted = 0 AND dia.deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM patra_registry.sys_dict_item_alias WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY source_system, external_code
SELECT * FROM patra_registry.sys_dict_item_alias WHERE source_system = #{sourceSystem} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY external_code

SELECT dia.* FROM patra_registry.sys_dict_item_alias dia JOIN patra_registry.sys_dict_item di ON di.id = dia.item_id JOIN patra_registry.sys_dict_type dt ON dt.id = di.type_id WHERE dt.type_code = #{typeCode} AND dia.deleted = 0 AND di.deleted = 0 AND dt.deleted = 0 ORDER BY dia.source_system, dia.external_code
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM patra_registry.sys_dict_item_alias WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT DISTINCT source_system FROM patra_registry.sys_dict_item_alias WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY source_system
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM patra_registry.sys_dict_item_alias WHERE source_system = #{sourceSystem} AND deleted = 0
